Flow Proposals — Review

Accept or reject proposed flows. Inter-module flows derive from cross_module_scored.yaml edges; intra-module flows come from atom clustering + industry framework matching. Accepted flows merge into data/workflows.yaml.

Review stage: these are proposals, not yet published. Accepted flows become new entries in data/workflows.yaml (via manual merge). Confidence chips indicate source strength — high = edge- or framework-derived; low = Haiku-inferred from atom clustering.
